message:
test(random): add 3 rng metamorphic relations for jump/fill invariants

Added three DeterministicRng metamorphic relations (9 fixtures) to
complement the existing three (partition additivity, fill-matches-
iterative-draw, bounded repeatability):

- jump_zero_is_identity (3 fixtures: seed=0, small, near-u64::MAX):
  jump_ahead(0) must be a no-op
- fill_then_iterate_resumes (3 fixtures: fill_len=1, 16, 512):
  next_u64() after fill_u64(N) equals the (N+1)th iterative draw
  (proves fill advances stream by exactly N)
- jump_composition_commutative (3 fixtures: small/large/asymmetric):
  jump_ahead(a)∘jump_ahead(b) ≡ jump_ahead(b)∘jump_ahead(a) — the
  jump action must be abelian, catching any off-by-one in interleaved
  jump/next scheduling.

37 rng_metamorphic cases total (from 28).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
